title: Jamaican Jerk Chicken
description: A spicy and flavorful dish from the Caribbean, made with jerk seasoning and grilled chicken.

ingredients.name: jerk seasoning
ingredients.notes: Make sure to buy a store-bought or homemade mix

ingredients.name: spicy palm sugar
ingredients.notes: Use it to add a sweet and spicy flavor

instructions: Rinse the chicken breasts and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Mix the jerk seasoning and palm sugar in a small bowl.
Rub the jerk seasoning mixture all over the chicken breasts.
Brush the chicken with olive oil and grill for 5-6 minutes per side.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve with sliced pineapple on the side.
